name: 排球入门指南
short_description: A simple game about volleyball made by a member of a school volleyball team. Hope you would enjoy it and arouse your interest of volleyball. Maybe one day you would pick up a ball, walk in the court, join in the team and try the real game. I'll be glad to hear that!
detailed_description:
How to Volley Ball is a game which offers you a chance to experience the feeling of playing volleyball. This excellent sport is worth trying. If you have never try it, just come to this game and you will understand how to pass and spike. You will also know different kind of attack mode.

In this game, you can enjoy :
· The real experience of volleyball.
· Opponents of different characteristic.
· 6 different game modes.
· plenty of backgrounds pictures.

If you have ever had interests in volleyball, don't hesitate to enjoy this game, maybe you will find your talent in volleyball.

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English*
*languages with full audio support
